trends.headline: Japan: South Korean arrested outside Yasukuni Shrine ceremony for war dead
trends.summary: Police said a South Korean national holding a banner with political messages was arrested at Tokyo's Yasukuni Shrine to Japan's war dead. Japan's prime minister did not attend proceedings, but around 120 lawmakers did.

trends.headline: EU approves €90bn loan for Ukraine as pipeline is turned on ending deadlock

trends.headline: Pope Leo decries inequality in corrupt Equatorial Guinea
